text:
> >Category:       ports
> >Responsible:    freebsd-ports-bugs
> >Synopsis:       [MAINTAINER] Update devel/bzrtools/
> >Arrival-Date:   Fri May 02 08:30:01 UTC 2008

Bah, I made this patch against stale versions of the files.  Sorry.
Updated to current head:


Index: Makefile
===================================================================
RCS file: /usr/cvs/ports/devel/bzrtools/Makefile,v
retrieving revision 1.24
diff -u -r1.24 Makefile
--- Makefile	25 Mar 2008 23:04:08 -0000	1.24
+++ Makefile	2 May 2008 10:02:48 -0000
@@ -6,9 +6,9 @@
 #
 
 PORTNAME=	bzrtools
-PORTVERSION=	1.3.0
+PORTVERSION=	1.4.0
 CATEGORIES=	devel
-MASTER_SITES=	https://launchpad.net/bzrtools/trunk/${PORTVERSION}/+download/
+MASTER_SITES=	https://code.launchpad.net/bzrtools/stable/${PORTVERSION}/+download/
 
 MAINTAINER=	fullermd@over-yonder.net
 COMMENT=	Extensions to devel/bazaar-ng
